name: vkcode-ai
description: On-device AI for vkcode: inline chat, inline suggestions and commit messages powered by a local model. No account, no sign-in.

vkcode.ai.enabled.description: Master switch for vkcode's on-device AI. When off, inline chat, inline suggestions and commit-message generation do not use the model.

vkcode.ai.model.description: Absolute path to the local GGUF model file used by vkcode AI.

vkcode.ai.serverPath.description: Absolute path to the bundled llama.cpp server executable that runs the local model.

vkcode.ai.contextSize.markdownDescription: Default context window (tokens) for the local model. `auto` uses a VRAM-safe default (8192) that works for any model on an 8GB-class GPU. Set a number to use a larger window — the model must support it and its KV cache must fit in VRAM (raising this on a big-context model like Qwen3 can run out of memory). For per-model sizes use `#vkcode.ai.contextSizeByModel#`. Changing this reloads the model.

vkcode.ai.contextSizeByModel.markdownDescription:
Per-model context window (tokens), taking precedence over `#vkcode.ai.contextSize#`. Each key is matched case-insensitively as a substring of the model file path, so a short name fragment works. Example:

```json
"vkcode.ai.contextSizeByModel": {
  "gemma": 16384,
  "qwen": 8192,
  "deepseek": 8192
}
```

The chosen window's KV cache must fit in VRAM. Changing this reloads the model.

enumDescriptions: Automatically use the best available GPU (CUDA on NVIDIA, otherwise Vulkan).
Run on the CPU only (no GPU offload).
vkcode.ai.gpu.markdownDescription: GPU backend for the local model. `auto` picks CUDA on NVIDIA GPUs and falls back to Vulkan. Use `off` to run on CPU. Changing this reloads the model.

vkcode.ai.thinking.description: Let the local model reason step-by-step before answering. The reasoning streams as live progress and is logged, but is never inserted into your document. When off, a smaller reasoning budget is used so the model answers directly.

vkcode.inlineSuggest.enabled.description: Provide inline (ghost text) code suggestions from the local model. Also requires editor.inlineSuggest.enabled.

vkcode.commitMessage.enabled.description: Show the local 'Generate Commit Message' action in the Source Control input.
